Running plans & motivation for women who move

Couch to 5K: A 9-Week Running Plan for Beginners

2026-07-08

The Couch to 5K program is scientifically designed to take beginners from sedentary to running 5K in just 9 weeks.

Understanding the Program

Alternate running and walking for gradually increasing intervals.

Weekly Breakdown

Weeks 1-3: Heavy walking, light running Weeks 4-6: Balanced intervals Weeks 7-9: Predominantly running

Getting Started

Invest in proper running shoes and find a safe route.

You’ve got this—every runner started as a beginner!

This article is for general informational purposes only and is not medical advice. It is not a substitute for professional diagnosis or treatment. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider about your individual situation, especially before making significant changes to your diet or exercise routine.
